page_metadata.biotools__summary: MyMiner is a free and user-friendly text annotation tool aimed to assist in carrying out the main biocuration tasks and to provide labelled data for the development of text mining systems.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MyMiner is a free and user-friendly text annotation tool aimed to assist in carrying out the main biocuration tasks and to provide labelled data for the development of text mining systems.
